content:
✔ Example Situations That Require a Secret Ballot:
• The Trial of Ascension → Does a player get to ascend into a unique archetype?
• The Great Exile → Should a faction member be permanently removed?
• The Cataclysmic Bargain → Should the class accept a devastating cost for a powerful reward?

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents power imbalances—no one knows who voted for or against them.
✔ Ensures players cannot game the system with predictable alliances.
✔ Adds social tension—people must guess who supports or opposes them.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 9.2

1. Should Solo Players Have a Way to Gain a Temporary Faction-Like Power, or Should They Always Be Isolated?

✔ Ex: Should a solo player be able to temporarily ally with a faction to gain access to their powers?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 545 (chunk 545/555)
